zh.lifeSummary: 當Rohese de Vernon於大約1282年出生在英國爾希布盧可時，她的父親Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook42歲，母親Mary Dacre23歲。她於1309年與Sir Thomas Davenport結婚。她去世於1321年在英國爾切斯特享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rohese de Vernon于大约1282年出生在英国爾希布盧可时，她的父亲Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook42岁，母亲Mary Dacre23岁。她于1309年与Sir Thomas Davenport结婚。她去世于1321年在英国爾切斯特享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Rohese de Vernon was born about 1282, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, was 42 and her mother, Mary Dacre, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Davenport in 1309. She died in 1321, in Chester, Cheshire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rohese de Vernon est née environ 1282, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Mary Dacre, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Davenport en 1309. Elle est décédée en 1321, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rohese de Vernon um 1282 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook 42 und ihre Mutter Mary Dacre 23. Sie hat 1309 Sir Thomas Davenport geheiratet. Sie starb 1321 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Chester, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Vernon è nata il circa 1282 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Mary Dacre, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Davenport nel 1309. Morì nel 1321, nel Chester, Cheshire, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rohese de Vernonが約1282年にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrookは42歳，母Mary Dacreは23歳であった。1309年にSir Thomas Davenportと結婚した。彼女は1321年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rohese de Vernon(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Dacre(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1309년 Sir Thomas Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1321년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rohese de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Mary Dacre, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Davenport em 1309. Ela faleceu em 1321, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rohese de Vernon родилась около 1282 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Dacre, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Davenport в 1309 г. Она умерла в 1321 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rohese de Vernon nació aproximadamente 1282, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph de Vernon II, Baron of Shipbrook, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Mary Dacre, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Davenport en 1309. Murió en 1321, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
